title: coussarea ilheotica
intro: Coussarea ilheotica, also known as the Ilheus Coussarea, is a plant species of the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Coussarea ilheotica include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its potential to prevent the development of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, are typically used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
